steps.title: Spot the past-time reference
steps.content: The phrase "that ran in early 2022" establishes when the exhibition occurred — a specific moment in the past. This time marker determines which verb tense belongs in the blank.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content:
Identify the grammar issue: verb tense. Rule: a specific completed past-time marker ("in early 2022") requires simple past tense.
  • Choice A — features: simple present tense; the exhibition is over, so present tense is incorrect. ✗
  • Choice B — has been featured: present perfect tense; implies ongoing relevance to the present, but the exhibition has a fixed past endpoint. ✗
  • Choice C — featured: simple past tense; correctly places the completed exhibition in 2022. ✓
  • Choice D — will feature: simple future tense; the exhibition already happened in 2022, so future is impossible. ✗
C is correct.
